GitHub Copilot Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.

MakerGitHub (Microsoft)
CategoryAI Coding Assistants
PricingFree tier for individuals; paid plans from $10/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit GitHub Copilot →

Best for

Developers wanting inline autocomplete directly in their IDE.

Pros

  • Deep integration with VS Code and JetBrains IDEs
  • Strong autocomplete and chat-based code explanations
  • Free tier now available for individual developers

Cons

  • Best experience tied to Microsoft/GitHub ecosystem
  • Can suggest outdated or insecure patterns without review

Alternatives to GitHub Copilot

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

Cursor

An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
